task: Write a Python function that parses an AWS S3 bucket URI (e.g., 's3://my-bucket/path/to/object') and returns a dictionary with keys 'bucket' and 'key'
Create a JSON object representing an AWS IAM policy that allows read-only access to all objects in a specific S3 bucket named 'data-lake'
Write a regular expression that matches valid AWS EC2 instance IDs (format: 'i-' followed by 17 hexadecimal characters)
